parallel.example: The two roads run parallel to each other.
There are parallels between the two stories.
parallel.example_zh: 這兩個故事有相似之處。

participant.example_zh: 每位參與者都拿到一個號碼。

particle.example: Tiny particles of dust filled the air.
particle.example_zh: 空氣中滿是細小的塵粒。

partly.example: The accident was partly my fault.
partly.example_zh: 這場意外有部分是我的錯。

passionate.example: She is passionate about saving animals.

pastry.example_zh: 這家麵包店賣新鮮的糕點。

patch.example: She sewed a patch over the hole.
patch.example_zh: 她在破洞上縫了一塊補丁。

patch.example: He patched the hole in the roof.
patch.example_zh: 他補好了屋頂上的破洞。

patent.example: He got a patent for his invention.
patent.example_zh: 他為自己的發明取得了專利。

pathetic.example_zh: 他那無力的藉口很可悲。

patrol.example: Guards patrol the area at night.
patrol.example_zh: 警衛在夜裡巡邏這個區域。

patron.example: A wealthy patron supported the artist.
patron.example_zh: 一位富有的贊助人資助了這位藝術家。

peasant.example: The peasant worked hard in the fields.

pedal.example: He pushed the pedal to speed up.
She pedaled up the steep hill.

penetrate.example: Sunlight could not penetrate the thick fog.

pension.example: He lives on his pension after retiring.
pension.example_zh: 他退休後靠退休金生活。

perceive.example: We perceive colors with our eyes.

perception.example: Her perception of the problem changed.
perception.example_zh: 她對這個問題的看法改變了。

performer.example: The performer bowed after the show.

persist.example: She persisted until she solved it.
persist.example_zh: 她堅持到把問題解決為止。

perspective.example: Try to see it from my perspective.

pessimism.example: His pessimism made the team gloomy.
pessimism.example_zh: 他的悲觀讓團隊氣氛低落。

petition.example: They signed a petition to save the park.
petition.example_zh: 他們簽了一份請願書要保住公園。

phase.example: We are in the first phase of the project.
phase.example_zh: 我們正處於專案的第一階段。

photographic.example_zh: 她有過目不忘的記憶力。

pickup.example: Arrange a pickup time for the package.

pier.example: We walked to the end of the pier.

pillar.example: Tall pillars supported the temple roof.
pillar.example_zh: 高大的柱子撐起了廟頂。

pipeline.example: Oil flows through a long pipeline.
pipeline.example_zh: 石油透過一條長長的管線輸送。

pirate.example: The story is about a brave pirate.
pirate.example_zh: 這個故事講的是一名勇敢的海盜。

pirate.example: It is illegal to pirate movies.

pitcher.example: The pitcher threw a fast ball.
She poured juice from the pitcher.

placement.example: The placement of the chairs was neat.

plea.example: She made a plea for help.

plead.example: The child pleaded for one more story.
plead.example_zh: 孩子央求再聽一個故事。

pledge.example: They made a pledge to protect the forest.
pledge.example_zh: 他們立下保護森林的誓言。

pledge.example: He pledged to help the poor.

plunge.example: The diver plunged into the deep water.
plunge.example_zh: 潛水者一頭栽進深水裡。

plural.example: Add an 's' to form the plural.

poetic.example: She wrote a poetic description of the sea.
poetic.example_zh: 她寫了一段富詩意的海景描述。

poke.example: He poked the fire with a stick.
She gave him a gentle poke.

porch.example: We sat on the porch in the evening.

portfolio.example_zh: 那位藝術家展示了她的作品集。

precaution.example: Take precautions to avoid the flu.
precaution.example_zh: 採取預防措施以免得到流感。

predator.example: The lion is a powerful predator.

preference.example: My preference is for tea, not coffee.

prejudice.example: We should judge people without prejudice.
prejudice.example_zh: 我們評斷人時不該帶有偏見。

premature.example: It is premature to celebrate now.

premier.example: It is the premier hotel in the city.
premier.example_zh: 這是城裡最頂級的飯店。

premier.example: The premier gave a speech today.

premise.example: His argument is based on a false premise.
premise.example_zh: 他的論點建立在錯誤的前提上。

premium.example_zh: 我們買了高級的咖啡豆。

premium.example: She pays a monthly insurance premium.

prescription.example: Take this prescription to the pharmacy.

presidency.example_zh: 他的總統任期持續了四年。

presidential.example: The presidential election is next year.

presumably.example: He's late, so presumably he missed the bus.
presumably.example_zh: 他遲到了，想必是錯過了公車。

presume.example: I presume you have read the rules.
presume.example_zh: 我猜你已經讀過規則了。

prevail.example: In the end, justice will prevail.

prey.example: The eagle dived toward its prey.
